programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Canada's consumer watchdog series since 1972, this news program uncovers wrongdoings in the marketplace. programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

When long-divorced parents (De Niro and Keaton) are forced to reunite and play the "happy couple" at their son's wedding, they must confront their past, present, and future—as the celebration threatens to turn into a full-blown fiasco!

programme.desc: Uber-mountain man Sylvester Stallone matches muscles and wits with ultra-bad guy John Lithgow in this dizzying thrill spectacular.

programme.title: The Spirit of Christmas Station
programme.desc: With a Christmas deadline looming, literary editor Isabell retreats to her family's cabin for inspiration. Finding the town in a slump, a local rancher helps her revive the Christmas Festival and discover the ending to her own story.

programme.desc: A father and daughter find a Christmas themed time capsule buried in their backyard. They task themselves with finding its owner and the father might just find love along the way.

programme.title: Road to Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. TV Producer Maggie brings her boss' three sons home for the holidays.

programme.title: Miss Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A letter from a young boy sends an official tree finder to a small town.

programme.title: Four Christmases And A Wedding

programme.title: Mini Movie

programme.title: Mini Movie

programme.desc: Date Whispering is the new trend in dating and Sam is the best.

programme.title: Steal Your Heart
programme.desc: Melissa is enlisted to form a jewelry bridal line with the CEO's son, Jake.

programme.title: The Virtuoso
programme.desc: Danger, deception and murder descend upon a sleepy town when a professional assassin accepts a new assignment from his enigmatic boss. Given a cryptic clue, the place and the time, he must identify his mysterious mark among several possible targets.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner and family are killed, FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge on an assassin named Rogue (Jet Li). Rogue's return sparks a violent war between rival Asian mobsters Chang (John Lone) and Shiro (Ryo Ishibashi), while the ultimate showdown between Crawford and Rogue reveals the truth.

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: Beneath a woman's striking beauty lies a secret that will unleash her indelible strength and skill to become one of the most feared assassins on the planet.

programme.title: The Divergent Series The Allegiant
programme.desc: Beyond the wall, Tris and Four face a threat more dangerous than they ever imagined, fighting for the future of an entire city in this action-packed third Divergent adventure.

programme.title: Divergent
programme.desc: A thrilling action-adventure set in a future where Tris Prior (Shailene Woodley) uncovers a conspiracy by a faction leader (Kate Winslet) that will change society forever.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Insurgent
programme.desc: Tris and Four race to unlock the truth about the past in this star-powered, action-packed second adventure from the Divergent series.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In need of a vacation from his ordinary life, factory worker Douglas Quaid (Colin Farrell) visits Rekall, a company that can turn dreams into real memories. Thinking that memories of life as a superspy are just the ticket, Quaid undergoes the procedure -- but it goes horribly wrong. Suddenly, Quaid is a hunted man. He teams up with a rebel fighter (Jessica Biel) on a search to find the head of the underground resistance and take down the leader (Bryan Cranston) of the free world.

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Amsterdam Vallon (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a young Irish immigrant released from prison. He returns to the Five Points seeking revenge against his father's killer, William Cutting (Daniel Day-Lewis), a powerful anti-immigrant gang leader. He knows that revenge can only be attained by infiltrating Cutting's inner circle. Amsterdam's journey becomes a fight for personal survival and to find a place for the Irish people in 1860's New York.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys
programme.desc: When John Connor (Jason Clarke), leader of the human resistance against Skynet, sends Kyle Reese (Jai Courtney) back to 1984 to protect his mother, Sarah (Emilia Clarke), from a Terminator assassin, an unexpected turn of events creates an altered timeline. Instead of a scared waitress, Sarah is a skilled fighter and has a Terminator guardian (Arnold Schwarzenegger) by her side. Faced with unlikely allies and dangerous new enemies, Reese sets out on an unexpected new mission: reset the future.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: In the wake of her grandmother's funeral, hotel manager Lisa Reisert (Rachel McAdams) is waiting to fly back home when she meets charming Jackson Rippner (Cillian Murphy) at check-in. She thinks it luck that they're seated together on the plane, but soon learns otherwise. Jackson hopes to assassinate the head of Homeland Security, but to do so, he needs Lisa to reassign the official's room number at her hotel. As insurance, Jackson has kidnapped Lisa's father (Brian Cox).

programme.title: Wrongfully Accused
programme.desc: Art patron Hibbing Goodhue (Michael York) is murdered, and an accident-prone concert violinist, Ryan Harrison (Leslie Nielsen), is arrested as the main suspect. Harrison didn't do it, but he's convicted of the crime. He's on the bus that will take him to prison, but he manages to escape after a traffic accident. On the run, Harrison tries to clear his name by seeking out the real killer, while the police, led by Lt. Fergus Falls (Richard Crenna), hunt him down.

programme.title: Short Circuit
programme.desc: After a lightning bolt gives it human emotions and intelligence, a military robot escapes and finds refuge at the home of an animal-loving pacifist (Ally Sheedy).

programme.title: Short Circuit 2
programme.desc: Having rescued robot Johnny Five (Tim Blaney) from being destroyed by the military in "Short Circuit," Indian scientist Ben Jahrvi (Fisher Stevens) moves to New York City to become an American citizen. After struggling to sell a few toy replicas of Johnny, Ben must scramble to make more when Sandy Banatoni (Cynthia Gibb) orders 1,000 for her department store. With Johnny's help, Ben begins making the gadgets, but his plans are endangered when thief Oscar Baldwin (Jack Weston) steals Johnny.

programme.title: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Encouraged by his girlfriend (Charisma Carpenter), a man (Christopher Gorham) joins his two siblings for their father's (Terry Bradshaw) weeklong event of competitive games.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
programme.desc: When the idealistic young Jefferson Smith (James Stewart) winds up appointed to the United States Senate, he gains the mentorship of Senator Joseph Paine (Claude Rains). However, Paine isn't as noble as his reputation would indicate, and he becomes involved in a scheme to discredit Smith, who wants to build a boys' campsite where a more lucrative project could go. Determined to stand up against Paine and his corrupt peers, Smith takes his case to the Senate floor.

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: When hard-charging New York newspaper editor Walter Burns discovers that his ex-wife, investigative reporter Hildy Johnson, has gotten engaged to milquetoast insurance agent Bruce Baldwin, he unsuccessfully tries to lure her away from tame domestic life with a story about the impending execution of convicted murderer Earl Williams. But when Hildy discovers Williams may be innocent, her reporter instincts take over.

programme.title: A Man for All Seasons
programme.desc: When the highly respected British statesman Sir Thomas More (Paul Scofield) refuses to pressure the Pope into annulling the marriage of King Henry VIII (Robert Shaw) and his Spanish-born wife, More's clashes with the monarch increase in intensity. A devout Catholic, More stands by his religious principles and moves to leave the royal court. Unfortunately, the King and his loyalists aren't appeased by this, and press forward with grave charges of treason, further testing More's resolve.

programme.title: We Were Strangers
programme.desc: When her brother is murdered, China Valdez (Jennifer Jones) swears revenge on the corrupt Cuban government he had been protesting. She joins the resistance led by Tony (John Garfield), an American with a plan that promises devastating results to their enemies. First they'll kill a government official, then plant a bomb at the funeral, which will wipe out the dead man's associates when it explodes. All they need to do is to dig an underground tunnel from China's house to the cemetery next door.

programme.title: Fences
programme.desc: Set in the 1950s Pittsburgh, the film adaptation of August Wilson's Pulitzer Prize-winning play takes a passionate look at former baseball player Troy Maxson as he fights to provide for those he loves in a world that threatens to push him down.

programme.title: Selma
programme.desc: From the Oscar-winning producers of 12 Years a Slave comes a powerful true story starring David Oyelewo and Oprah Winfrey. Facing violent opposition, Martin Luther King, Jr., led a historic march from Selma to Montgomery, changing the world forever.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: An inspirational account of basketball coach Ken Carter, who received both praise and criticism when he made headlines for benching his entire undefeated team for poor academic performance.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: A comedy-drama starring Hugh Grant as Will, a rich, child-free and irresponsible Londoner in his thirties who, in search of available women, invents an imaginary son and starts attending single parent meetings. As a result of one of his liaisons, he meets Marcus, an odd 12-year-old boy with problems at school. Gradually, Will and Marcus become friends, and as Will teaches Marcus how to be a cool kid, Marcus helps Will to finally grow up.

programme.title: Wild Child
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Poppy (Emma Roberts) has everything her unlimited credit cards can buy, and a spoiled attitude to match. After a final thoughtless prank, her exasperated father (Aidan Quinn) ships her off to boarding school in England. There, Poppy meets her match in a stern headmistress (Natasha Richardson) and a class full of girls who will not tolerate her selfishness.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: Even in death, British reporter Joe Strombel (Ian McShane) is dedicated to completing his final piece on London's notorious Tarot Card Killer, and American journalism student Sondra Pransky (Scarlett Johansson) discovers during a magician's (Woody Allen) performance that she can communicate with Joe. He hands her the story of a lifetime, and the chase leads directly to British aristocrat Peter Lyman (Hugh Jackman), with whom she has fallen dangerously in love.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: Maud Bailey (Gwyneth Paltrow), a brilliant English academic, is researching the life and work of poet Christabel La Motte. Roland Michell (Aaron Eckhart) is an American scholar in London to study Randolph Henry Ash (Jeremy Northam), now best-known for a collection of poems dedicated to his wife. When Maud and Roland discover a cache of love letters that appear to be from Ash to La Motte, they follow a trail of clues across England, echoing the journey of the couple over a century earlier.

programme.title: Death on the Nile
programme.desc: On a luxurious cruise on the Nile River, a wealthy heiress, Linnet Ridgeway (Lois Chiles), is murdered. Fortunately, among the passengers are famed Belgian detective Hercule Poirot (Peter Ustinov) and his trusted companion, Colonel Race (David Niven), who immediately begin their investigation. But just as Poirot identifies a motley collection of would-be murderers, several of the suspects also meet their demise, which only deepens the mystery of the killer's identity.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: An American Christmas Carol
programme.desc: This loose adaptation of the classic Charles Dickens tale moves the story to New England, where stingy elderly businessman Benedict Slade (Henry Winkler) ruthlessly collects debts and makes life miserable for everyone around him. His unscrupulous behavior warrants a Christmas Eve visit from his ghostly former partner and other spirits that show him the error of his ways. Can Slade turn his life around and become a better person before it's too late?

programme.title: Christmas for a Dollar
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, the Kamp family struggles to get by after Mrs. Kamp passes away. The children expect another Christmas without presents until their father brings home one dollar for them to spend on gifts.

programme.title: Signs of Your Heart
programme.desc: Allie's new tenant might be the answer to all her problems as he bonds with her deaf son Finn.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki is forced to repeat the same day over and over as she searches for an antiquity: Pandora's Box.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Coreen leads a case that takes them to an insect demon who is using local Goth kids to feed her swarm.

programme.title: Scented with Love
programme.desc: Paris-trained perfumer Rosalie is forced to share her new store space with furniture maker Jason.

programme.title: Storm Cell
programme.desc: Storm chaser April, whose parents died in a twister during her childhood, must warn her brother and his unsespecting town of a massive storm heading their way before he meets the same fate.

programme.title: Double Patty
programme.desc: Woo-ram a struggling athlete and big foodie finds himself in a burger restaurant one fateful evening unaware that a simple double patty hamburger would change his life. He Instantly clicks with Hyun-ji an aspiring news anchor who works hard at the restaurant to make ends meet. As their relationship grows so do their confidence strength and determination to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Pain
programme.desc: A love story between a man who cannot sense anything and a woman with hemophilia.

programme.title: A Case Of Bachelor Abduction
programme.desc: Three friends investigate a mysterious woman who abducted and shamed two of them using various tactics.

programme.title: FRIEND : THE GREAT LEGACY
programme.desc: Joon-suk takes the blame for a friend's murder years later the friend's son unaware becomes his protégé.

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Best Mistake 1 : The Movie
programme.desc: Kim Yeon Do (Lee Eun Jae) is a studious high school girl whose life is being made miserable by a boy from her past. Despite all of her efforts, she can't get peace as he won't leave her alone. So she hatches a plan. On her social media pages, she posts a picture of another boy, in the hope that this move will put an end to the irritation. But this move turns out to have unexpected consequences: It turns out that the boy in the picture is actually one of her schoolmates. Named Ji Hyun Ho (Kang Yul), he is a bit of a loose cannon. Although he is very popular, he dislikes studying - and prefers play. The rest of the school soon learns about the social media post, as news spreads fast in the classroom! This leads to a number of run-ins with ji Hyun Ho. But the more they get to know one another, the closer they get - causing yet further complications for a whole host of classmates!

programme.title: Once in a summer
programme.desc: Su-jin, a writer of the TV program, go searching for ‘SEO Jung-in', the first love of professor YOON Seok-young.

programme.title: My Paparotti
programme.desc: Story about a gangster who wants to be a tenor singer in South Korea.

programme.title: Broken Buckets
programme.desc: After serving 17 years in prison, Travis Cane returns home to rebuild his life and reconnect with his family. But his once bright son, Dontae is acting out and abandons his goals in basketball for a life on the streets.

programme.title: Exposed
programme.desc: Content creator Mia's serene retreat turns sinister when stalker Damon forces her into a dark livestream. He exposes her deepest secrets, from infidelity to a cover-up in a death, unraveling her life for the world to see.

programme.title: Double Kill
programme.desc: An FBI agent must hunt down a serial killer who has kidnapped his wife and is holding her against her will, until he can find her doppelgänger and kill them both.

programme.title: Major Dundee
programme.desc: During the end of the Civil War, Major Dundee guards Confederate prisoners, Union deserters and ordinary hard-bitten criminals in a remote fort. When Apaches attack the fort and make off with three children, Dundee must set up a posse including Confederates, who face a choice between joining up or being shot. The feud between Dundee and Tyreen is also heated up by a sultry Mexican widow.

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre
programme.desc: The story of Gen. Custer (Philip Carey) and the Little Bighorn is seen through the eyes of two of his subordinates (Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin).

programme.title: The Last Posse
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher Sampson Drune (Charles Bickford) is resented by members of the Romer family, who feel he swindled them out of their cattle. They retaliate by robbing Drune and fleeing with the money. Drune organizes a posse of townspeople and asks alcoholic Sheriff John Frazier (Broderick Crawford) to deputize the group. They head out in search of the bandits with Frazier in tow. Two days later, the Romers and Drune are dead, Frazier is wounded and the money has disappeared.

programme.title: Riders of the Badlands
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger's uncanny resemblance to a wanted outlaw results in his own arrest by a fellow lawman.

programme.title: The Tin Star
programme.desc: Ben Owens, a greenhorn sheriff who hasn't worn his badge long... and won't live to wear it much longer unless he gets some savvy help.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Watch out Gringo! Sabata Will Return
programme.desc: An army officer kills men under his command and robs a hundred thousand dollars in gold from a chest.

programme.title: Dynamite Joe
programme.desc: A government agent uses his talent for explosives to protect a U.S. gold shipment from marauding Comancheros.

programme.title: Run Man Run
programme.desc: An unlucky thief makes a friend in prison and from there goes hunting for buried gold.

programme.title: Two Brothers in Trinity
programme.desc: After inheriting a land plot in a dusty place called Trinity, the antagonistic half-brothers, Lester and Jesse, reunite to pursue different aspirations, only to find themselves neck-deep in trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: Dakota Incident
programme.desc: Indians trap a bank robber (Dale Robertson), a beauty (Linda Darnell), a bank clerk (John Lund) and other stagecoach passengers in a gully.

programme.title: Tension at Table Rock
programme.desc: When locals are wrongfully led to believe that Wes Tancred (Richard Egan) murdered a gunslinger in cold blood, they exile the innocent man. Tancred sets off in search of a new start and arrives in the dusty hamlet of Table Rock -- only to find his reputation has preceded him. To avoid trouble, Tancred uses an assumed name. But, when Sheriff Fred Miller (Cameron Mitchell) talks of trouble at the hands of a violent gang, Tancred agrees to be deputized, and struggles for his shot at redemption.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sprightly elderly lady arrives in North Fork and announces that she plans to capture a bandit.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps an alcoholic former doctor regain his self-respect.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a book salesman as a killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Long Trek - Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a Western town divides over sending a shipment of gold to aid the Confederacy.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two trappers try to escape from a prison in Mexican-controlled San Diego.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A circus owner looks to hire a female horse rider.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Italian-Americans try to push the Mafia out of their town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A white leader of Indian tribes discovers a scheme to take away the tribes' gold claims.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.sub-title: The Newspaper That Went to Jail
programme.desc: When a judge orders the closure of a mine under suspicious circumstances, a newspaperman tries to find out the truth he prints an article that draws the judge's ire.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Feud between rancher and cattle driver.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Against her family's wishes, a woman helps the man who shot her husband.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: As their crops dry out, desperate farmers seek help from the owner of a hydraulic mining machine, but he refuses to spare any water.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When a medicine man gives a boy a tonic that puts him in a coma, an apothecary must find the cure.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two brothers work independently to make money for each other one brother becomes a prospector while the other raises a thoroughbred.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An injured man harbors ill intent for the trading post owners offering him shelter.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A newcomer helps free a town from beneath the heel of a gunslinging saloon owner.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers renew their spirit of adventure as they and other residents of a Texas town join a cattle drive to the Montana Territory.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove

programme.title: I Didn't Do It
programme.desc: I Didn't Do It is a one hour special that follows a murder investigation in Austin Texas gone terribly wrong. When 20 year old Nancy DePriest is murdered while working alone, two unlikely suspects, Chris Ochoa and Richard Danziger, are questioned and quickly charged with the crime. It seemed like a simple case. In fact, these young men were completely innocent and the killer remained at large. In this fascinating and riveting narrative, their nightmarish ordeal ended only after the intervention of a tenacious young homicide detective in Austin and a confession by the real killer.

Lidia begins today's meal with a creamy risotto alla Milanese with saffron and marrow bone followed by a succulent quail stuffed with Italian sausage and mushrooms. For dessert, it's an Italian classic - light and creamy panna cotta with seasonal berries.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Today is all about stock and soup! Join Lidia as she prepares three heart-warming soups. Chicken stock made into "Stracciatella", laced with eggs and spinach, Stuffed Veal Chop with oozing Fontina, and a Braised Kale with Bacon.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Focaccia is an irresistible, crunchy Italian flatbread. It's great for sandwiches and even for stuffing. Lidia begins by making a classic rosemary and lemon focaccia she then moves on to a filled focaccia with smoky speck and fontina cheese. To finish these two lunchtime and snack favorites, she creates a salad of shrimp, fava, and cranberry beans.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates three great main course ideas that are just right for days when you want to do everything in one dish and put it in the oven until it's ready to serve. She makes a baked fennel with tomatoes and oozing cheese. She then creates a rollatini of sole with flavored breadcrumbs baked in a light and delicate sauce of fresh herbs, lemon, and white wine.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia prepares Lentil Country Salad, Cheese Gnocchi with Butter and Sage Sauce, and Pork Pockets Stuffed with Pickles and Cheese.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Brodetto is a savory, soup fish preparation that can be found up and down the coast of Italy. Lidia makes her Brodetto with onion, scallion, clams and mussels and lots of parsley and pepperoncino. Lidia's walnut cake is delicate and nutty with just enough espresso to make it truly Italian.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Everyone loves baked pasta, and in this episode, Lidia prepares a baked penne dish with a comforting pork ragu and zucchini topped with a golden crust of cheese. She also makes an elegant salad of asparagus, scallions, and boiled egg and finishes the meal with a delicious and moist chocolate zucchini cake.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Roasted Peppers Stuffed with Tuna. Savory Onions Stuffed with Lamb and Sweet Raisins The Cauliflower and Tomato Soup

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia begins this meal with a savory zucchini and rice crostata. She then turns to the sweets with a celebration of zeppole, a fried delicious dough stuffed with creamy ricotta. Grandma Erminia, joins Lidia for this segment. Lastly, there is still time for a classic and Lidia prepares an easy steamed mussel dish with white wine, onions, bay leaves, and pepperoncino.

programme.title: Lidia's Italian Table
programme.desc: Lidia shares her technique for making a basic marinara, enthusiastically immersing herself in sauce making Lidia's way. She then prepares two faorite pasta dishes: a seafood vermicelli with fresh clams and scallops and a parchment wrapped, baked ziti with mozzarella, marinara and fresh basil. Tutti a tavola! She commands, and we follow joyfully.

programme.title: Cal in the Field
programme.sub-title: Salmon vs Striper on California's Coastal Waterways
programme.desc: This week, Cal returns to California's Sacramento Valley—this time diving below the surface of the Sacramento River. At first glance, it may seem like salmon and stripers are at odds, but is that really the whole story? Join Ryan Callaghan as he fishes for both species and dives deep into the water issues that have challenged this region for decades.

programme.title: Cal in the Field
programme.sub-title: Is CWD Changing Midwestern Deer Hunting?
programme.desc: This week, Cal visits Doug Duren's farm outside Cazenovia, Wisconsin, to hunt deer and discuss Chronic Wasting Disease. Home to our good friend Doug, Cazenovia is also ground zero for CWD—a 100% fatal, highly transmissible prion-based disease. Join Cal as he hunts with Doug to see firsthand how CWD is reshaping Wisconsin's whitetail deer hunting traditions.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana's week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve's after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn't the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaska's coastal rainforest for a solo Sitka blacktail deer hunt. With challenging terrain, thick fog, and incessant rain, finding a buck won't be easy. But if Steve connects on a Sitka blacktail, he'll celebrate with a camp meal of rock-pounded tenderloin.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range. The bears here are on a quest to fatten up on high elevation blueberries before they hibernate for the winter. Steve will need to hike into steep, rugged terrain to find a fat black bear and some of the finest tasting meat available to the American hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaska‚ Kenai Peninsula. Steven Rinella holds one of the permits this year, and he and his brother Danny backpack into the mountains, into rugged country they‚ never seen, in hopes of finding a billy goat.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge and seriously good food. 300 years ago Spanish settlers let a handful of pigs loose in order to turn acorns into bacon, and today Steve is hunting the feral descendants of those pigs. If he's successful in finding a wild boar, Steve will prepare a backcountry gourmet feast of pork loin roasted with apples and rosemary cooked in tin foil over a fire.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven Rinella, his brother Matt, and good friend Matt Moison camp and hunt the badlands of Eastern Montana for mule deer. Freezing cold temperatures and unforgiving topography add to the already-challenging job of finding a giant mule

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddy's historical family farm to hunt small game and whitetails in the famed Driftless area. There's plenty of action and tasty wild game meals like Grilled Butterfly Venison Steaks and Hassenpfeffer rabbit stew.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions with dog. With the help of two expert lion hunters, he immerses himself in the physical and emotional challenges of cougar hunting. Sometimes the reward of the hunt is the thrill of success and a delicious meal, and other times it's a more personal, and possibly more important lesson of knowledge and humility.

programme.title: Overlanders
programme.desc: Down to three teams, beautification gets competitive, and the overlanders must navigate through a maze of trails, where any wrong turn could lead to their demise.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Alexa blasts sand across the U.S., riding with the pros in Glamis, then hitting the beach in Coos Bay, and getting a snowy surprise in Sand Hollow. The dunes are a lifestyle!

programme.desc: Hunter Mike Main and PH Buzz Charlton are in Zimbabwe's Dande Safari Area after both Cape buffalo and Sable antelope, two of the Zambezi Valleys most prized species.

Larry's dream comes true and gets to fire an RPG at Terry to see if he can shoot it out of the air, and Terry gets to play with a mini-gun again to see if he can cut a van in half!!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Illinois isn't the first state you think about when it comes to waterfowl, but the Wentz Brothers have dialed in some honey holes over the years. On this episode, a slew of waterfowl experts put to the test some of the newest Winchester waterfowl ammunition during the great migration of the Mississippi Flyway in early December. We'll also head north to the shores of Kodiak Island, Alaska with Chris and Casey Keefer as they push the limits of Winchester's new Last Call Double Shot on fast-ripping sea ducks. GUESTS: Zach Wentz (Team Winchester) Nathan Robinson (Winchester Ammunition) Ryan Swaner (Winchester Repeating Arms) Chris Jennings (Ducks Unlimited) Mike Brasher (Ducks Unlimited) Scott Olmsted (American Hunter) Travis Hall (Field & Stream) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester)

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Giant Kentucky Velvet Whitetails
programme.desc: About 2-3 months ago Mark purchased a 300+ acre farm in Kentucky. After running trail cameras and putting food plots on the farm, Mark now has the chance to get in the stand on opening day of Kentucky's bow season. There have been plenty of shooter bucks on the farm but only a few still are holding their velvet. Mark has his sights set on a Giant Kentucky Velvet Whitetail. The day before opening day Salt River puts on a celebration that features the @theswonbrothers.

programme.title: Fall of Fame | The Fail Zone
programme.desc: From sand to snow, no sport was safe from disaster in this episode.

programme.title: Fall of Fame | The Great Fail Chase
programme.desc: From slippery stones to wild races, athletes are left chasing their dreams—and failing in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: Fall of Fame | The Wrecking Zone
programme.desc: From close calls to full-speed mishaps, athletes collide with their limits in wild crashes and laughs

programme.title: Fall of Fame | Fails on the Rise
programme.desc: From rock climbing to off-balance moments, athletes push their limits and tumble in epic fails.

programme.desc: Whether it's skating, snowboarding, or parafailing, athletes constantly find themselves on the edge of disaster.

programme.title: Fall of Fame | The Ultimate Faildown
programme.desc: From midair meltdowns to wrecking laps, this finale showcases the most spectacular failures as athletes push the limits.

programme.title: Fall of Fame | Game, Set... Fail
programme.desc: Athletes take on the game, their gear, and gravity—proving that sometimes, failing is the real sport!

programme.title: Fall of Fame | The Playbook of Pain
programme.desc: From epic misfires to painful landings, these athletes prove that not all game plans lead to glory!

programme.title: Fall of Fame | The Struggle Is Real
programme.desc: From early fumbles to last-second heartbreaks, these sports moments prove that failing is a full-game effort!

programme.title: Fall of Fame | Masters of Disaster
programme.desc: From brutal crashes to epic fails, these athletes prove that greatness can come from going down—hard.

programme.title: Fall of Fame | United in Defeat
programme.desc: Whether solo or squad deep, these athletes take synchronized failing to a whole new level.

programme.title: Fall of Fame | Victory Denied
programme.desc: "They aimed high, slipped low, and took themselves out—sometimes, the biggest fail is being almost great. "

programme.desc: It's time to witness the fitness. Will humans power through pain, or is failure a destined SWOLLmate?

programme.title: Jose Sarduy
programme.desc: Jose Sarduy is a Cuban-American Air-Force pilot turned comedian, and he's got no shortage of stories. Jose's back at Dry Bar with hysterical tales of planes, Priuses, and penguins.

programme.title: John C. Morgan
programme.desc: John C. Morgan takes to the stage as someone sure to be recognized. Along with immaculate impersonations, John teaches the audience invaluable lessons on how to conceal presidential farts and how many C's of leadership there are.

programme.title: Kenn Kington
programme.desc: Kenn Kington finds the funny in life's everyday moments—marriage quirks, parenting adventures, and roadwork woes. He turns real-life experiences into nonstop laughs. Get ready for a stand-up show full of heart and hilarity!

programme.title: Jeff Allen
programme.desc: Jeff Allen's humorous third special is another smash-hit. In this Dry Bar Comedy special, Jeff chronicles his relationships with his empty-nester wife, house-mate father-in-law, and sixty-seven-year-old body. He also talks about how with all his kids gone, his wife is trying to fix him.

programme.title: Shayne Smith
programme.desc: In his second Dry Bar Comedy special, stand-up comedian Shayne Smith delivers more stories about everything from a failed robbery to a wrestling match in the New York Subway, claw machines, Florida headline shenanigans, and even saving the life of a dog.

programme.title: Brad Upton
programme.desc: Brad Upton unleashes his comedic prowess by roasting millennials. With no intention of slowing down, he sets his sights on satirizing lampoon masks, merging, and millionaires. Brad takes the audience on another uproarious comedy ride as he fearlessly tackles these timely subjects, leaving no stone unturned in his quest for laughter.

programme.title: Brad Upton
programme.desc: Brad Upton first stepped on stage in September of 1984 and he's never looked back. This ex-grade school teacher is now in his 30th year of comedy and is nearing 6000 lifetime performances. He is a past winner of the Las Vegas Comedy Festival and appeared recently at Caesar's Palace as part of the HBO Comedy Festival. He has spent the last eight years as the opening act for the legendary Johnny Mathis and did multiple shows all over the country with the late, great Joan Rivers. He has also been seen in concert with The Smothers Brothers, Smokey Robinson, Kenny Rogers, Dolly Parton, Lewis Black, George Jones, Glen Campbell, Pam Tillis and many others. Coast to coast all over North America isn't the only place Brad performs. In 2014 Brad headlined in Singapore, Hong Kong, The MGM in Macau and did eight nights in Israel as part of the Comedy for Koby benefit. His new CD entitled, "Brad Uptonogood" is heard regularly on Sirius Satellite Radio and is available online wherever music is sold. He also just released his first DVD entitled, "Brad Upton, Live from the 509".

programme.title: Brian Bates
programme.desc: Turning to comedy after twenty years in corporate America, Brian Bates jokes about ubering his hecklers home, meeting women while hiking, and people who dont believe in God but do believe in wrestling.

programme.title: Dennis Regan
programme.desc: The King Of Queens writer Dennis Regan comes swinging hard with his quick wit and flawless delivery. The laughs just keep on coming in "Dennisland".

programme.title: Shayne Smith
programme.desc: Stand-up comedian Shayne Smith delivers more stories about everything from a failed robbery to a wrestling match in the New York Subway and even saving the life of a dog in his second original Dry Bar Comedy special, “Alligator Boys."

programme.title: Card Sharks
programme.desc: This show from legendary Mark Goodson-Bill Todman Productions features two contestants trying to predict answers to survey questions for the opportunity to play a game with oversized playing cards for a chance to win cash. One contestant guesses how many people (out of 100) gave a certain answer to a question and the other contestant then guesses if the number is higher or lower than the opponent's guess. The winning contestant then faces a row of cards and must determine if each succeeding card is higher or lower than the one that precedes it. The contestant who wins two out of three games wins the match and plays the bonus round, called Money Cards. The Money Cards round is similar to the card game in the main game but with three levels of cards instead of one row. The contestant is given $200 at the beginning of Money Cards and wagers any or all of that money when guessing if the cards will be higher or lower than the previous one. A perfect round could earn the contestant $28,800.

Frankie picks a less-than-ideal partner (Ben Mendelsohn) to help him, but despite their combined incompetence, they manage to make off with the mob's money. programme.title: Electric Eel Shocks Me Again... and Again!

programme.title: Attacked by Bloodsucking Parasites!
programme.desc: Bloodsucking bugs go on the attack! Coyote lets these parasites bite in real time to show how fast they latch and how to stop them.The echidna looks cute, but its spikes say otherwise. Mark handles this spiny Australian mammal and explains its strange biology.

programme.title: Stung by a Deadly Scorpion!
programme.desc: Mark takes on a deadly scorpion in this tense episode. With pincers and venom, the sting test gets real—and painful—fast.The centipede strikes back! Mark revisits one of his creepiest encounters to see if this many-legged predator will finally deliver a bite.

programme.title: Mini Bulls Don't Have Mini Horns!
programme.desc: They're tiny, they're horned, and they're tougher than they look. Coyote introduces us to mini bulls—small cattle with big personalities. Mark gets another jolt—this time on purpose—from an electric eel. He demonstrates how the animal uses electricity to navigate and defend.

programme.title: Did I Find a Murder Hornet in the USA?!
programme.desc: Could murder hornets be in the U.S.? Coyote investigates sightings and explains how to identify these massive, invasive insects.This ancient fish has long, needle-like teeth and a monstrous look. Coyote dives into its evolutionary history and predatory tactics.

programme.title: $10,000 Animal Challenge – Who Will Win?!
programme.desc: With a $10,000 prize on the line, Coyote and his crew take on a wild animal challenge to see who can find, catch, and identify the most species.Ten turtles in one day? Coyote takes on the shell-filled challenge with nets, patience, and muddy hands to see how many species he can spot.

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Attack Dogs!
programme.desc: In a dramatic training exercise, Coyote allows himself to be bitten by three trained attack dogs. Protective gear is tested to the limit.Ever wanted to catch fireflies and make a glow lantern? Coyote shows how to safely observe these luminous bugs and builds a bug-powered lantern.

programme.title: Eaten Alive – Human Hands vs. Piranha!
programme.desc: How does it feel to be bitten by piranhas? Coyote tests this freshwater legend with his own hands—and the results are intense.Slow motion never looked this painful. Coyote's hand meets a snapping turtle's jaw in a frame-by-frame breakdown of force and reaction.

programme.title: Stung by 200 Angry Yellowjackets!
programme.desc: 200 angry yellowjackets swarm Coyote during this painful sting challenge. He analyzes the results while barely keeping his cool.A filming prank turns into a police encounter! Coyote gets arrested while making a video—proof that wild adventures sometimes cross the line.

programme.title: PREHISTORIC TREASURE FOUND?!
programme.desc: A surprising discovery leads Coyote on an adventure uncovering prehistoric relics. The episode mixes paleontology, exploration, and thrilling insights into ancient life.

programme.title: Rattlesnake Rattle – You Won't Believe What's Inside!
programme.desc: What's inside a rattlesnake's rattle? Coyote carefully dissects one to reveal the anatomy and how this iconic warning system actually works.Coyote goes in search of the elusive golden trout, a rare species featured in video games and high-altitude streams alike. Will he catch one?

programme.title: Hognose Snake – Will It Bite?!
programme.desc: Hognose snakes are known for their bluffing. Coyote tries to provoke a bite to reveal whether this quirky serpent is all hiss and no bite.A chainsaw meets a mysterious box in this over-the-top unboxing. Coyote takes power tools to presents in a gift-opening like no other.

programme.title: Bitten by a Giant Asian Centipede!
programme.desc: With its venomous fangs and lightning speed, the giant Asian centipede is nightmare fuel. Coyote takes a bite and regrets it instantly.

programme.title: What in the World? EP01

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn Signs: Family and Home
programme.desc: Discover sign language along with your favorite Baby Einstein Characters! Learn how to sign the names of common things from different objects found at home and outside, family, and even your very own neighborhood through repetition and narration. Real-life images of toys and objects along with gentle melodies engage viewers as they learn a variety of different signs.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn About Space and Sky
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.desc: Another author releases his own version of the events in AK Yearling's Daring Do books upsetting Rainbow Dash.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: Growing Up is Hard to Do
programme.desc: The Cutie Mark Crusaders are magically transformed into grown-ups.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: Big Mac and Sugar Belle decide to propose to each other.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: A Camping We Will Go / Campfire Stories
programme.desc: The Mane 6 go on camping trip. / The ponies entertain themselves by telling some good old-fashioned stories.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: The ponies teach Trixie the true meaning of friendship. / The ponies try to introduce Fluttershy to her hero.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: The magic of Equestria mysteriously begins to fail.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.desc: The Mane Six try to escape from Tartarus.

programme.title: My Little Pony
programme.sub-title: Beginning of the End - Part I
programme.desc: Celestia and Luna decide to retire and hand off the ruling of Equestria to Twilight and her friends.

programme.title: The Bug Club
programme.desc: Sid and his friends use their magnifying glasses and discover ants, rolie polies, and caterpillars around the playground.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Great Green Adventure
programme.desc: In this special episode, Blippi celebrates Earth Day with his Great Green Adventure. Caring for the environment is one of our prime responsibilities and Blippi teaches children how by taking them on a puzzle-solving adventure.

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.title: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: n Den City, duels are held in the highly advanced VR world Link VRAINS, which is always under attack by the Knights of Hanoi. However, a hero named Playmaker has arrived to face the Knights, capturing a program they want called an Ignis.

programme.title: Seize the Wind!
programme.desc: Playmaker continues his duel with the Knight of Hanoi using the new Speed Duel rules. Playmaker is backed into a corner by the Knight's Cracking Dragon, but a data storm soon envelopes the field and Playmaker activates his Skill.

programme.title: Blippi's Summer Games
programme.desc: Blippi is back with Blippi's Sports Summer Games Movie For Kids!

programme.title: Top Talent
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival. Strawberry and Cherry are going to sing a duet, Orange is going to juggle, Plum will perform a ballet, Blueberry is writing and directing a play that the Berrykins will perform, Lemon will design animal-shaped hairstyles and display them herself, Princess Berrykin is going to yodel, and Berrykin Bloom will to do a stand-up comedy routine. Raspberry, who was the big star of the music recital (with only nine mistakes), is going to perform her same keyboard piece.

programme.title: A Star is Fashioned
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores—everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy. During Raspberry's preliminary trip to the city to begin arrangements for her new design studio, her friends get a taste of life without her. They miss her, and it makes them sad. Cherry admits to Strawberry that she's concerned for Raspberry—stardom is not all it's cracked up to be. We see that Cherry was worried about her friend, not jealous. Raspberry returns to pack up her little boutique. Her friends barely recognize her.

programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures
programme.desc: Join Blippi on a series of exciting educational journeys where he uncovers the Case of the Missing ABCs, explores the charming Ranch at the Pier, and delves into London's rich transportation history at both the Transport Museum and the RAF Museum. From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun, the world's most famous and favourite sheep, is back for more laugh out loud adventures on Mossy Bottom Farm. Season 4, episodes 28-30.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun and the gang are back! This time they're joined by a multitude of visitors including lazy farmhands and rock stars, as well as troublesome moles and hedgehogs in need of a good night's sleep. Season 5, episodes 1 – 3.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun and the gang are back! This time they're joined by a multitude of visitors including lazy farmhands and rock stars, as well as troublesome moles and hedgehogs in need of a good night's sleep. Season 5, episodes 4 - 6.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun spies three prank-pulling llamas at a Country Fair and tricks the Farmer into buying them. Back at Mossy Bottom Farm, mischief ensues. When things start to spiral out of control, Shaun has to take action to oust the llamas and save the farm.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun The Sheep - Mission Inboxible: The Farmer is setting up his new computer. The Flock take the opportunity of his back being turned to have a game of football. When the ball accidentally lands inside the farmhouse, Shaun comes up with an ingenious disguise to help him retrieve it.

programme.title: Farmer's Llamas: The Director's Perpective
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the making of Shaun the Sheep: The Farmer's Llamas - the Director's Perspective.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun The Sheep - Happy Farmer's Day: Bitzer treats the Farmer to a restaurant style dining experience, offering a delicious pie as the main course. But when the pie goes missing, Bitzer makes the mistake of accepting Shaun and the flock's offer of help in the kitchen…

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun The Sheep - The Pelican: An unusual guest lands on the Farm. Shaun & Bitzer try their best to make the visitor feel welcome but can't work out what the unexpected arrival needs. When they realise it's hungry, they set about trying to find it some food.

programme.title: Learning Time with Timmy
programme.desc: Learning Time with Timmy - Healthy Snacks: Discover new words and join in the activities with Timmy and his friends in this fun learning series developed with the British Council, world experts in teaching English.

programme.title: Happy the Hoglet
programme.desc: Happy the Hoglet - Happy Little Birdies: Happy feels angry when some birdies eat his strawberries.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Timmy Time - Timmy's Picnic: The class is off on a picnic! But during a game of football, the ball bursts on Apricot's prickles. Apricot feels bad that her friends no longer have a ball to play with, but soon finds a good use for her prickles – picking up the picnic litter!

programme.title: Timmy Time Narrated
programme.desc: Timmy is a little lamb with a lot to learn! He has just turned 3 and is used to getting his own way. Now Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals - at Nursery School! Season 3, episodes 5 - 8. Narrated.

programme.title: Timmy Time Narrated
programme.desc: Timmy is a little lamb with a lot to learn! He has just turned 3 and is used to getting his own way. Now Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals - at Nursery School! Season 3, episodes 9 - 12. Narrated.

programme.title: Timmy Time Narrated
programme.desc: Timmy is a little lamb with a lot to learn! Season 3, episodes 13 - 16. Narrated.

programme.title: The Very Small Creatures
programme.desc: Five curious little friends have fun exploring a child's play area when no one's around. Through play, Pink, Green, Yellow, Blue and Orange learn about themselves, each other and the world around them. Season 1, episodes 1 - 8.

programme.title: The Very Small Creatures
programme.desc: Five curious little friends have fun exploring a child's play area when no one's around. Through play, Pink, Green, Yellow, Blue and Orange learn about themselves, each other and the world around them. Season 1, episodes 4 - 12.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Dolphin Dilemma // Ruby and the Beast
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: When the Moon was Missing // Trouble in a Bubble
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: When the Moon was Missing // Trouble in a Bubble

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril

Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem.
